answer: The API key goes in the X-Api-Key header on every request.
Per the README, the server listens on port 3000.
REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS is 5000, so requests time out after 5 seconds.
The gateway allows up to 100 requests per minute, per the README.
TTL_SECONDS is 300, so cache entries are kept for 300 seconds (5 minutes).
The app connects to the metrics database, according to the README.
According to docs/API.md, requests must include the key in the X-Api-Key header.
docs/CONFIGURATION.md says the service listens on port 3000.
Per docs/API.md, the rate limit is 100 requests per minute.
Looking at src/http/requestConfig.js, REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS is 5000, so requests time out after 5 seconds.
src/cache/store.js sets TTL_SECONDS to 300, so entries are kept for 300 seconds.
src/db/connection.js connects to the analytics_prod database.
